# String Concatenation Assignment

String concatenation assignment operator

```perl
$message .= $suffix;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$message .= $suffix;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$message .= $suffix;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
